messageActionErrorNoContent: No content to create a story from.
toastSegmentsGenerationFailed: Failed to generate scenes. Please try again.
generateSegmentsTooltip: Generate images for all scenes in the story based on the script.
orientationDescription: Vertical is great for mobile. Horizontal is best for desktop and TV.
orientationWarning: Note: Orientation cannot be changed later unless you regenerate all images.
noSegmentsInStory: This story has no scenes yet.
confirmDeleteSegmentDescription: This will permanently delete the scene and all its images. This action cannot be undone.
placeholderSegmentDescription: Enter a description for this scene...
toastUploadProcessingFailed: Upload failed to process. Please try again.
toastFileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 5MB.
toastUploadFailed: Upload failed. See console for details.
uploaderDragDrop: Drag & drop or click to upload
toastNoVersionSelected: Please select a version to edit first.
quickEditDescription: Make small, incremental changes to the current image. Best for fine-tuning details.
editPromptPlaceholder: e.g., Make him smile / Change to a night scene with a moon / Give him sunglasses / Turn into a Van Gogh style oil painting
editPromptError: Select a version from the history panel to start editing.
regenerateDescription: Create a completely new image based on a detailed description. This will not use the current image.
textToVideoDescription: Create a video clip directly from a detailed text prompt. This does not use any existing image.
videoPromptPlaceholder: Describe the scene in detail. Try including: shot type (e.g., 'close-up shot'), style ('sci-fi', 'action movie'), or camera motion ('dolly shot', 'pan shot').
styleStudioSimpleDescription: Describe the overall artistic style for your story. This will guide the AI in generating every scene.
visualStylePromptPlaceholder:
e.g., Ghibli animation style, summer, nostalgic and warm...
e.g., Cyberpunk, neon lights, rainy Tokyo streets...
e.g., Dark fantasy, gothic architecture, somber atmosphere...
visualStylePromptHint: The more descriptive you are, a better the AI can understand your vision. This style applies to the entire story.
createNewStoryDialogDescription: You can paste your script below, or start with a blank page.
noStoriesYetDescription: No stories yet. Click the button to start your first one!
confirmDeleteStoryDescription: This will permanently delete the story, all its scenes, and generated images. This action cannot be undone.
tryDifferentCategoryOrCreate: Try a different category, or create a new story!
discoverAndGetInspired: Discover amazing stories from the community and get inspired.
startYourOwnStoryNow: Start crafting your own story now.
beTheFirstToPublish: Be the first to publish a story and share it with the world!
toastStoryUnpublished: Story has been unpublished and set back to a draft.
storyUnarchivedSuccess: Story successfully unarchived and moved to drafts.
generateVideoTooltip: Generate a video from all story segments.
mustHaveSegmentsToGenerateVideo: You must generate segments before creating a video.
toastVideoGenerationStarted: Video generation has started! You can check the status on this page.
toastVideoClipGenerationFailed: Failed to start video clip generation.
mediaLibrarySearchPlaceholder: Search all your generated images and videos...
mediaLibraryReadyDescription: Recently generated items will appear here. Start typing to search.
stitchVideoTooltip: Stitch all selected clips into a final video.
clipsNotReadyForStitchingTooltip: Clips are not ready for stitching yet.
noVideoVersionToStitch: No video version available to stitch.
toastVideoStitchingStarted: Video stitching has started. This may take a moment.
toastNoClipsSelectedForStitching: No video clips have been selected for stitching.
toastPartialStitchWarning: Only {{count}} of {{total}} scenes have a selected video clip. The final video will only contain these clips.
toastRenderFailed: Client-side rendering failed to produce a video.
toastVideoStitchingComplete: Video is ready! It will appear on the page shortly.
videoTagNotSupported: Your browser does not support the video tag.
bgmDialogDescription: Add background music from a public URL. This will be applied to the entire video.

empty.title: You have no characters yet
empty.description: Create your first character to ensure visual consistency across your stories.

dialog.createDescription: Provide training data to create a consistent character. This process may take 15-30 minutes.
dialog.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete the character and all associated training data. This action cannot be undone.

form.name: Character Name
form.namePlaceholder: e.g., Captain Eva, the space pirate
form.imagesHint: The first image will be used as the cover image.

error.onlyImages: Only image files (JPEG, PNG, WEBP) are allowed.

guide.title: Image Guidelines for Best Results
guide.rule2: Variety is key. Include images with:
guide.rule3: Ensure the character is the main subject in most photos.
guide.rule5: Avoid images with heavy filters, text, or multiple people.
guide.rule6: The AI will learn the visual style from these images.
guide.rule7: Total upload size must not exceed {{size}}.

toast.uploadError: File upload failed. Please try again.
toast.createInProgress: Files uploaded. Character creation is in progress...
toast.createSuccess: Character successfully created! Training has started.
